project.visual_style: cinematic realistic photography, natural skin texture
project.color_palette: cold gray with restrained red accents
project.lighting_rule: stable cold ceiling light and red rim light from camera right

character.face_features: oval face, straight eyebrows, small scar near right eyebrow
character.default_wardrobe: dark charcoal hooded jacket, black T-shirt, dark cargo pants
character.signature_props: silver analog watch on left wrist

scene.lighting: cold fluorescent lights, weak red emergency light from camera right
scene.environment_details: wet floor, numbered pillars, damaged sedan at pillar B7
scene.screen_direction: moves screen left to screen right
scene.persistent_objects: damaged sedan, red fire cabinet, yellow floor line

shots.action: walks toward the damaged sedan and raises a flashlight
shots.position: near pillar B6, facing screen right

transition.exit_frame: right hand reaches the driver's door handle
transition.camera_axis: north side of the yellow floor line

shots.action: grips the handle and slowly opens the driver's door

transition.exit_frame: door half open, flashlight aimed into the dark cabin
transition.camera_axis: north side of the yellow floor line
